item.name: Alexandrian Chest Gear Coffer (IL 270)
item.description:
A heavy chest containing a piece of Alexandrian attire.

Required level: 60. IL: 270. Chest gear type determined by current job or class at time of opening. Cannot be opened in instanced areas such as dungeons, PvP areas, or raids.

obj.n: Alexander - The Soul of the Creator (Savage)
